user_input:
STACK: Python / FastAPI systems

PROJECT: E-commerce platform API

DESCRIPTION:
We are building an e-commerce platform.
It should support customers, products, orders, and reviews.

FEATURES:

CUSTOMERS:
- register customer
- update customer profile
- delete customer
- get customer by id
- list all customers

PRODUCTS:
- create product
- update product
- delete product
- get product by id
- list all products

ORDERS:
- create order (customer + list of products)
- cancel order
- get order by id
- list orders by customer
- update order status

REVIEWS:
- add review (customer + product)
- delete review
- list reviews by product

DATA MODELS:

Customer:
- name: string
- email: string
- address: string

Product:
- name: string
- price: number
- stock: integer
- description: string

Order:
- customerId: string
- products: list
- status: string
- total: number

Review:
- customerId: string
- productId: string
- rating: integer
- comment: string

functions.name: register_customer
functions.description: Register a new customer

functions.name: list_customers
functions.description: List all customers

functions.name: get_customer_by_id
functions.description: Get a customer by ID, raises 404 if not found

functions.name: update_customer
functions.description: Update a customer profile, raises 404 if not found

functions.name: delete_customer
functions.description: Delete a customer, raises 404 if not found

functions.name: create_product
functions.description: Create a new product

functions.name: list_products
functions.description: List all products

functions.name: get_product_by_id
functions.description: Get a product by ID, raises 404 if not found

functions.name: update_product
functions.description: Update a product, raises 404 if not found

functions.name: delete_product
functions.description: Delete a product, raises 404 if not found

functions.name: create_order
functions.description: Create a new order

functions.name: get_order_by_id
functions.description: Get an order by ID, raises 404 if not found

functions.name: update_order_status
functions.description: Update order status, raises 404 if not found

functions.name: cancel_order
functions.description: Cancel an order, raises 404 if not found

functions.name: list_orders_by_customer
functions.description: List orders by customer

functions.name: add_review
functions.description: Add a new review

functions.name: delete_review
functions.description: Delete a review, raises 404 if not found

functions.name: list_reviews_by_product
functions.description: List reviews by product
